zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Ferrers於1410年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯度維-比-哈特利時，她的父親Edmund Ferrers24歲，母親Elene de la Roche16歲。她於1431年10月29日與John Clinton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1483年在英國英格蘭肯特福爾可斯同享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Ferrers于1410年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯度維-比-哈特利时，她的父亲Edmund Ferrers24岁，母亲Elene de la Roche16岁。她于1431年10月29日与John Clinton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1483年在英国英格兰肯特福爾可斯同享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Ferrers was born in 1410, in Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund Ferrers, was 24 and her mother, Elene de la Roche, was 16. She married John Clinton on 29 October 1431. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1483, in Folkestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Ferrers est née en 1410, à Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Ferrers, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elene de la Roche, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John Clinton le 29 octobre 1431. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1483, à Folkestone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Ferrers 1410 in Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Ferrers 24 und ihre Mutter Elene de la Roche 16. Sie hat am 29. Oktober 1431 John Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1483 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Folkestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Ferrers è nata il nel 1410 nel Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edmund Ferrers, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elene de la Roche, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato John Clinton il 29 ottobre 1431. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1483, nel Folkestone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Ferrersが1410年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストウエ-ブイ-チャートリーで生まれた時，父Edmund Ferrersは24歳，母Elene de la Rocheは16歳であった。1431年10月29日にJohn Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1483年にイギリスイギリスケントフォルケストーンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Ferrers(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스타우-비-처틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Ferrers(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elene de la Roche(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1431년 10월 29일 John Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 폴케스톤에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Ferrers nasceu em 1410, em Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Ferrers, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elene de la Roche, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John Clinton em 29 de outubro de 1431. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1483, em Folkestone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Ferrers родилась в 1410 г. в местности стоуе-би-чартли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund Ferrers было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elene de la Roche, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Clinton 29 октября 1431 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1483 г. в местности фолкестоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Ferrers nació en 1410, en Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edmund Ferrers, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elene de la Roche, tenía 16 años. Se casó con John Clinton el 29 de octubre de 1431. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1483, en Folkestone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
